articles.title: MicroStrategy Buys 15,400 BTC, Boosting Holdings To 402,100 Bitcoin
articles.description: MicroStrategy (NASDAQ: MicroStrategy (MSTR), the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, has increased its holding by making another Bitcoin purchase of 15,400 BTC worth $1.5 Billion. The purchase was made at an average price of $95,976 per Bitcoin totaling MicroStrategy holdings to 402,100 BTC. This latest purchase further bolsters MicroStrategy’s aggressive Bitcoin investment approach thus...

articles.title: Grayscale files for Solana ETF as SOL token surges 6%
articles.description: Grayscale Investments has filed to convert its existing Solana Trust into a spot ETF on NYSE Arca, as the firm seeks to expand its $134 million Solana investment vehicle into a more accessible format.This development comes as Solana's price shows signs of recovery, increasing 6% in the past 24 hours to $237, after a 12% decline last week that saw it drop to $215.The recent price activity...

articles.title: Grayscale files for spot Solana ETF with SEC
articles.description: Grayscale Investments has filed to list a spot Solana (SOL) ETF on the New York Stock Exchange, joining a major growing firm that is seeking to launch Solana ETFs in the U.S. This filing sent Solana’s price surging by $10 immediately. Grayscale Investments has filed to list a spot Solana (SOL) ETF with the New […]

articles.title: Cardano’s Total Value Locked Surpasses $700 Million, Marking a Major Recovery
articles.description: The total value locked (TVL) on the Cardano (ADA) ecosystem has soared past the $700 million mark as it recovers from the cryptocurrency bear market that saw it drop to a $50 million low back in November 2022. According to DeFiLlama data, there are currently $709 million locked in smart contracts on the Cardano network, […]

articles.title: Ethereum’s monthly onchain volume hits $183.7 billion in November
articles.description: This represents the highest onchain volume on Ethereum in three years, since December 2021’s $241 billion.

articles.title: Sir Richard Branson’s Virgin Voyages becomes first cruise line to accept Bitcoin payments
articles.description: Virgin Voyages becomes the first cruise line to accept Bitcoin for bookings. Passengers can use Bitcoin to book for cruises including the upcoming Virgin Voyages’ Annual Pass. Virgin Voyages targets younger travellers with crypto adoption in a competitive market. Virgin Voyages, the innovative cruise line founded by Sir Richard Branson, has announced that it now […] The post Sir Richard...

articles.title: Will Coinbase continue its meme token streak: Mog Coin (MOG) added to upcoming listing roadmap
articles.description: Mog Coin (MOG) was added to the Coinbase roadmap for future listings. MOG rallied both in its Base and Ethereum version, though with an unknown spot listing deadline.

articles.title: Ethereum layer 2 Mantle Network taps Chainlink to strengthen cross-chain capabilities
articles.description: Mantle Network, an Ethereum layer 2 solution, has adopted Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) to bolster its cross-chain capabilities, aiming to provide developers with a secure and reliable infrastructure to build dApps across multiple blockchains.CCIP promotes seamless and trustless transfer of data and value across various blockchain networks, allowing Mantle to connect...

articles.title: 5 promising cryptocurrencies Coinbase just added to the COIN50 index
articles.description: Coinbase Institutional announced it is adding five new cryptocurrencies to the Coinbase 50 Index (COIN50), suggesting these are promising investments. … Continue reading The post 5 promising cryptocurrencies Coinbase just added to the COIN50 index appeared first on Finbold.

articles.title: Yuga Labs Partners with Tokenproof to Enhance Real-World NFT Ownership Verification
articles.description: TL;DR Yuga Labs acquires Tokenproof’s tech team to enhance real-world NFT ownership verification, announced on December 3, 2024. The acquisition strengthens Yuga Labs’ infrastructure, integrating Tokenproof’s technology to authenticate NFT ownership outside the digital realm. This move is expected to enhance the utility of NFTs, making them more accessible and enjoyable for real-world events...
